base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of scouter_red_scout_blue_scout_and_flyclops — a character from 1995 chrono trigger. Scouter, Red Scout, Blue Scout & Flyclops. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
